name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State can be "idle", "trying", or "critical" for each process *)
Init == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}] /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ state[i] = "idle" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
          \/ state[i] = "trying" /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
          \/ state[i] = "critical" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES participants, state, votes, decision

PrepareMsg == [msg |-> "Prepare"]
VoteYesMsg == [msg |-> "VoteYes"]
VoteNoMsg == [msg |-> "VoteNo"]
CommitMsg == [msg |-> "Commit"]
AbortMsg == [msg |-> "Abort"]

Init == /\ participants = 1..N
        /\ state = [i \in participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ votes = [i \in participants |-> {}]
        /\ decision = "None"

PreparePhase == /\ \E i \in participants: state[i] = "Init"
                 /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Prepared"]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

VotePhase == /\ \E i \in participants: state[i] = "Prepared"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = {VoteYesMsg}]
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Voted"]
              /\ UNCHANGED decision

CommitPhase == /\ decision = "Commit"
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

AbortPhase == /\ decision = "Abort"
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]
               /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

DecideCommit == /\ \A i \in participants: votes[i] = {VoteYesMsg}
                 /\ decision' = "Commit"
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

DecideAbort == /\ \E i \in participants: votes[i] = {}
                 /\ decision' = "Abort"
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

Next == PreparePhase \/ VotePhase \/ DecideCommit \/ DecideAbort \/ CommitPhase \/ AbortPhase

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, votes, decision>>

TypeOK == /\ participants \in SUBSET 1..10
          /\ state \in [participants -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Voted", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ votes \in [participants -> SUBSET {"VoteYes", "VoteNo"}]
          /\ decision \in {"None", "Commit", "Abort"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = philosopher holding it *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i /\ state[i] = "hungry"

PickUp(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"] /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]

PutDown(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"] /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]

Hungry(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"] /\ forks' = forks

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (state[i] = "thinking" /\ PickUp(i)) \/ 
          (CanEat(i) /\ PutDown(i)) \/ 
          (state[i] = "eating" /\ Hungry(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K, size is the number of items *)

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* produce an item (here represented by 1)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* consume an item
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of servers, NULL
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

States == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ \E newTerm \in Nat : newTerm > currentTerm[i] /\ state[i] = "Follower" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"] /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![i] = newTerm] /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
          \/ \E j \in 1..N : state[i] = "Candidate" /\ currentTerm[i] = currentTerm[j] /\ votedFor[j] = NULL /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![j] = i]
          \/ \E j \in 1..N : state[i] = "Candidate" /\ currentTerm[i] = currentTerm[j] /\ votedFor[j] = i /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Read == /\ readers' = readers + 1
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active

Write == /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        /\ readers' = readers

Next == \/ Read
        \/ Write

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Proc, Chan
(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of channels (pairs of processes) *)

VARIABLES state, channel, marker

(* state[p] is the local state of process p *)
(* channel[c] is the sequence of messages in channel c *)
(* marker[c] is TRUE if a marker has been sent on channel c *)

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [Proc -> State]
          /\ channel \in [Chan -> Seq(Message)]
          /\ marker \in [Chan -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have initial state, channels empty, no markers sent *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> InitState(p)]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [c \in Chan |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a message from p to q *)
Send(p, q, m) == /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

(* Receiving a message at q from p *)
Receive(p, q) == /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Tail(channel[(p, q)])
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

(* Sending a marker on channel (p, q) after recording state *)
SendMarker(p, q) == /\ marker'[(p, q)] = TRUE
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel>>

(* Receiving a marker at q from p *)
ReceiveMarker(p, q) == /\ marker'[(p, q)] = FALSE
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E p, q \in Proc:
          /\ p # q
          /\ Send(p, q, Message(p, q))
        \/ \E p, q \in Proc:
          /\ p # q
          /\ Receive(p, q)
        \/ \E p, q \in Proc:
          /\ p # q
          /\ SendMarker(p, q)
        \/ \E p, q \in Proc:
          /\ p # q
          /\ ReceiveMarker(p, q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, sent

(* Type definition *)
TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ sent \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: token at node 1, no messages sent *)
Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ sent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation: token moves clockwise, node may send message *)
Next == \/ (* Token passes to next node *)
          /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
          /\ sent' = sent
        \/ (* Token holder sends a message *)
          /\ token' = token
          /\ sent' = [sent EXCEPT ![token] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen

(* Types *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
    /\ promises \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
    /\ accepts \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
    /\ chosen \in V

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ accepts = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = NULL

(* Proposer prepares a proposal with a new ballot *)
Prepare(i) ==
    LET b == proposers[i].ballot + 1 IN
    /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![i] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> proposers[i].value]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, promises, accepts, chosen>>

(* Acceptors promise to not accept lower ballots *)
Promise(j) ==
    /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![j] = [ballot |-> acceptors[j].ballot, value |-> acceptors[j].value]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, accepts, chosen>>

(* Proposer accepts a value with a ballot *)
Accept(i) ==
    LET b == proposers[i].ballot IN
    /\ accepts' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> b, value |-> proposers[i].value]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, promises, chosen>>

(* Acceptors accept a proposal *)
AcceptProposal(j) ==
    /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![j] = [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot, value |-> proposers[j].value]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, promises, chosen>>

(* Once a value is chosen, it is never changed *)
Chosen(v) ==
    /\ chosen' = v
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..M: Prepare(i)
    \/ \E j \in 1..N: Promise(j)
    \/ \E i \in 1..M: Accept(i)
    \/ \E j \in 1..N: AcceptProposal(j)
    \/ Chosen(V)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

ASSUME File \in Seq(1..1000) /\ Len(File) > 0

VARIABLES seq, sent, acked, retransmits, finished

Init == /\ seq = 1
        /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Len(File) |-> 0]
        /\ finished = FALSE

SendChunk == /\ seq <= Len(File)
             /\ sent' = sent \cup {seq}
             /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, retransmits, finished>>

AckChunk == /\ seq \in sent
            /\ acked' = acked \cup {seq}
            /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retransmits, finished>>

Retransmit == /\ seq \in sent
              /\ retransmits[seq] < MAX_RETRIES
              /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![seq] = @ + 1]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, finished>>

GiveUp == /\ seq \in sent
          /\ retransmits[seq] >= MAX_RETRIES
          /\ finished' = TRUE
          /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retransmits>>

Next == \E action \in {SendChunk, AckChunk, Retransmit, GiveUp} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seq, sent, acked, retransmits, finished>>

====
